raw.message: 【新テーマ拡張パック登場】コレクションが、もっと楽しく♪

hook.summary: Title screen transition to a rare Xerneas card
hook.visual_action: A phone screen showing the game logo in a mystical forest setting zooms into a glowing, high-rarity Xerneas card.

scene_flow: Opening shot of the game's title screen on a mobile device set against a mystical forest background.
Zoom in and transition to a high-rarity Xerneas card with dynamic glowing effects.
Sequential text overlays emphasize the rarity and the player's role in collecting.
Final end card displaying the game logo, daily free pack offer, and download links.
on_screen_text: コレクションするのは
ゼルネアスをキミの手の中に
audience_proxy: Pokémon fans and trading card collectors who enjoy high-quality digital card games.
